Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Runzhong Technology Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Runzhong Technology Co., Ltd. is a specimen of an 'EdTech and IT system integrator in a commercial office building' that was severely misjudged by the official system. The forensic engine has forcefully cleaned the underlying fake consumer electronics OEM data triggered by Apple Inc. The official registry system was completely blinded by the extremely exaggerated heavy-industry vocabulary in its license, such as 'computer manufacturing,' 'communication equipment manufacturing,' and 'mobile terminal equipment manufacturing,' and mechanically categorized it into 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing.' However, the physical probe and common-sense engine directly uncovered its baseline: this established enterprise, founded in 2005, has 19 insured employees, indicating it is a well-functioning physical team. But its registered address is extremely fatal: 'Room 404, Zhengyang Building, No. 56 Yudao Street, Qinhuai District, Nanjing.' In a 4th-floor office of a commercial office building like Zhengyang Building, hiring 19 people to set up an assembly line to 'manufacture' computers, optical communication equipment, and mobile terminals? This completely violates basic laws of physics, fire safety, and modern manufacturing common sense. Skipping over those 'manufacturing' words hard-coded to cater to specific bidding qualifications, and reviewing the genuinely implemented services in its license: 'sales of specialized teaching instruments,' 'information system integration services,' and 'education consulting services.' The diagnostic conclusion is extremely clear: this is absolutely not a heavy electronic manufacturing plant; this is a pure 'IT System Integrator & EdTech Provider operating in a commercial office building.' These 19 individuals are primarily project managers, software engineers, and implementation personnel. Utilizing their independent domain 'njrzkj.com', they mainly provide schools or enterprises with the procurement, system integration, and subsequent maintenance services of teaching instruments and network equipment.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 76)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / IT SYSTEM INTEGRATOR & EDTECH PROVIDER
